description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian, depicted with a naturalistic human form and proportions. The figure appears to be wearing a long, fitted coat or jacket that extends to the thighs, with a structured collar and a straight silhouette. The lower body is clad in slim, straight-legged pants, and the feet are covered with low-profile shoes. The arms are relaxed at the sides, and the head is proportionate, with a short hairstyle that is close to the scalp. The overall posture is upright and neutral, suggesting a person standing or walking in an urban environment. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the surface finish is matte with subtle shading to indicate fabric and skin textures.
description: An upright adult figure in a long coat and slim pants, with short hair and low-profile shoes, standing in a neutral pose.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from a high angle, showing the top of the head, shoulders, and upper back, with the coat's collar and shoulder structure visible.
description_view_1: A close-up of the back and upper body, highlighting the smooth surface of the coat and the straight fall of the garment.
description_view_2: A side view emphasizing the profile of the head, the straight line of the coat, and the relaxed arm at the side.
description_view_3: A distant, angled view showing the full length of the figure, with the slim legs and shoes visible.
attribute_clothing_type: long fitted coat, straight-legged pants, structured collar
